title: Health Policy Analyst
description: Sanofi is seeking a Health Policy Analyst to monitor healthcare policy developments, analyze regulatory impacts on our pharmaceuticals business, and provide strategic recommendations. You will track state and federal legislation, engage with policymakers, and ensure compliance with evolving regulations.
responsibilities: Monitor federal and state healthcare legislation and regulatory developments
Analyze impact of policy changes on pharmaceutical pricing, coverage, and market access
Prepare policy briefs and impact assessments for senior leadership
Engage with policy organizations and advocacy groups
Track regulatory requirements and ensure business compliance
Support development of company policy positions and testimony

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Health Policy, Public Health, Political Science, or related field
skills: Healthcare policy knowledge and legislative analysis
certifications: None required; MPH or policy certification preferred

benefits: Health, dental, vision, and mental health coverage
Hybrid work flexibility and work-life balance
